arts.sum: He has helped Everton complete 26.8 long balls each game - the highest number of successful long passes, while no Premier League side is more accurate with their crosses in open play (27%). We have won 18 of our last 22 Premier League games at Emirates Stadium, and are looking to keep three successive clean sheets on home soil for the first time since December 2021.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid want Arsenal target to UNLOCK Mbappe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have joined the race to sign Inter Milan forward Marcus Thuram, according to sensational reports in Spain. Arsenal and Manchester United have both been linked with the 27-year-old for the past few months, while Barcelona, Real Madrid and Liverpool are also interested in signing him next year, according to Spanish outlet Fichajes .

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Gabriel injury, Edu replacement search and January transfers
arts.sum: The club has done very well to make that day feel very special for all the people who got the chance to know him and recognise who he was especially as a person. We are used to playing every three days, the boys trained today and they are really fired up and really looking forward to the game and understanding it is a tough opponent and that we will have to be at our best to beat them.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have a 'really bright' youngster in their ranks who 'continuously surprises' the coaches
arts.sum: Arsenal have made quite a name for themselves as a club that gives youth a chance. Bukayo Saka is the biggest recent success story to...

arts.ttl: Man City transfer could scupper Arsenal chances of landing long-term target
arts.sum: Manchester City's rumoured interest in Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes could scupper Arsenal's chances of landing long-term target Alexander Isak. From an Arsenal perspective, the concern centres around Newcastle potentially settling any future PSR fears with a sale of Guimaraes, which would take away any need to part ways with Isak.

arts.ttl: Is Gabriel fit to start for Arsenal vs Everton? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has surprisingly been very open on Gabriel's injury recovery before Everton which will please Fantasy Premier League managers. Despite the fact William Saliba was on target twice in the two games Gabriel missed, he is still five points behind his centre-back partner.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives Gabriel Magalhaes injury update and two more ahead of Arsenal vs Everton
arts.sum: The trio are major doubts heading into Saturday's clash with Everton, although Arteta admitted Gabriel has a chance of being available. Mikel Arteta has provided the latest on the fitness of his Arsenal squad ahead of their Premier League clash with Everton at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: 'Might have been nice': Arsenal snub leaves midfielder with regrets as he moves to Indonesia aged 25
Arsenal looking to extend all-time English football winning record in Everton Premier League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal will have the opportunity to extend an all-time winning English football record when they welcome Everton to the Emirates Stadium for Saturday's Premier League meeting with Everton.

arts.ttl: Club have now spoken to Arsenal man’s entourage about January – Gunners still need convincing
arts.sum: Napoli have now spoken to Arsenal defender Jakub Kiwior’s entourage about a move in the January transfer window but have work to do to convince the Gunners. That’s according to Tuttomercatoweb, who report that Napoli have held a ‘discussion’ with Kiwior’s entourage about a move.
